zotero.abstractNote: We propose a novel approach for filtering in switching linear dynamical systems (SLDS). By combining variational inference with a switching linear dynamical model, we derive a filtering algorithm that is both computationally efficient and capable of capturing complex, non-linear dynamics. Our method, which we call Switching Linear Dynamics for Variational Bayes Filtering (SLD-VBF), uses a variational approximation to the posterior distribution of the latent states and the switching variables. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on several challenging synthetic and real-world datasets, showing that it outperforms existing methods in terms of both accuracy and computational efficiency.
zotero.proceedingsTitle: Proceedings of the 36th International Conference on Machine Learning
